_documentation: What's New banner — sparingly-used site-wide announcement, used per CLAUDE.md §12. When `active: true`, every page renders a small dismissible banner fixed at the top of the viewport. Visitors who dismiss it don't see it again until `version` changes. High bar for activation: a new section visitors would find without reading the CHANGELOG, a major feature visible above the fold, or a milestone (live conference programme, brand launch). NOT used for quality patches, structural refactors, infra, or copy edits. Flip active true → false manually after 4–6 weeks, or sooner once the announcement is no longer fresh.
_active_reason: Pointed visitors to the live ESSC 2026 programme ahead of Stockholm (11–12 June). Turned off on 2026-06-13, the day after the conference closed: the programme is no longer live and the 2026 page has become an archive.

headline.en: The full ESSC 2026 programme is live.
headline.fr: Le programme complet de l'ESSC 2026 est en ligne.
